task.title: Align AgentRelaySpawnOptions.binaryArgs with Rust binary args type

events.content: Model AgentRelaySpawnOptions.binaryArgs as typed broker init options instead of raw argv: Model AgentRelaySpawnOptions.binaryArgs as typed broker init options instead of raw argv

raw.question: Model AgentRelaySpawnOptions.binaryArgs as typed broker init options instead of raw argv
raw.chosen: Model AgentRelaySpawnOptions.binaryArgs as typed broker init options instead of raw argv
raw.reasoning: The Rust broker init command has a fixed structured surface (api_port, api_bind, persist, state_dir). Using a TS object keeps the SDK aligned with the broker contract and avoids invalid flags like --debug compiling.

retrospective.summary: Typed AgentRelaySpawnOptions.binaryArgs to the broker init flags, serialized them in AgentRelayClient.spawn, and updated internal callers/tests to use the structured shape.
